channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Schecter Diamond Stiletto Extreme 4 Bass Guitar — $499.99
item.description:
$499.99 · Good · The Music Shoppe Sales and Learning Center

Schecter Diamond Stiletto Extreme 4 Bass Guitar

This used Schecter Diamond Series Stiletto Extreme 4 Bass Guitar is in good condition and comes upgraded with straplocks for secure playing. Built with a contoured mahogany body and an eye-catching figured maple top, this instrument offers a fast, comfortable playing experience. All electronics, hardware, and structural components are fully functional with only minor signs of cosmetic use.

Key Features

  • Condition: Used – Good condition (has light scratches and dings throughout)
  • Upgrades: Installed straplocks included
  • Scale Length: 34-inch standard long scale
  • Fretboard: Rosewood with distinct Vector pearloid/abalone inlays
  • Frets: 24 extra-jumbo frets
  • Fretboard Radius: Flat 16-inch radius for fast, low-action tracking
  • Neck: Bolt-on maple neck with a comfortable thin "C" profile
  • Body Wood: Mahogany body with a quilted/figured maple top
  • Electronics: Two Schecter Diamond Bass active humbucking pickups
  • Controls: Master volume, master blend, and an active 2-band EQ (Bass/Treble boost and cut)
  • Hardware: Sleek black chrome including a Diamond Bass bridge

Why Buy From - The Music Shoppe?

  • Preferred Seller: Highly rated for trusted service.
  • Expert Inspection: Professionally vetted by our experienced team.
  • 100% Authentic: Fully authorized factory dealer protection.
  • This is an In-Store Pickup from our Harrison Ohio Retail Location - The Music Shoppe Sales & Learning Center

item.title: ESP LTD Stream 2018 - Blackburst — $600
item.description:
$600 · Very Good · Proper Bass

Hello, this is an ESP LTD Stream-1005, 5 string bass. The bass is in very good condition, can’t detect any fret wear. Body and neck in awesome condition, tuners have a couple very minor little dings. EMG pickups sound big and awesome. Hipshot hardware. Now the reason for the discounted price. I relocated both strap locks, one on the back by the heel and the rear one over a bit higher. I have 2 other Stream basses that I’ve done this with, my personal preference. I filled the holes with wood filler. There is a new set of D’ Addario strings on the bass. Any questions or photos, please email me. I’m shipping to USA, lower 48 states only, sorry to rest of the world, it’s a shipping thing. Thanks.

item.title: Music Man Stingray 1978 - natur — $5,720.43
item.description:
$5,720.43 · Very Good · Carolinas Gear Outlet

Sehr guter original 1978er Stingray Bass

- Bünde gut

- Halsstab ok

- Technisch absolut top

- Ein Flügel einer Mechanik leicht verbogen

- Hart gerockt

item.title: Silvertone 1444 1960s — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Good · Steven's Gear Garage

This is a 1960's era 1444 Silvertone Bass. Everything is original, however, I upgraded the tone knobs (I will include the 1/2 of the original tone knobs). Additionally, the silvertone headstock logo is missing. This is a short scale bass, and has incredibly beautiful relic/wear, especially on the neck. It plays very smoothly and has an exceptional tone. This is the most affordable one you will find on Reverb. I'm looking to downsize my gear.


TAGS: Danelectro, Silvertone, Fender, Rickenbacker.

item.title: D'Mark JBX8C - Buckeye 25L0013 JBX8C 2026 - Natural — $3,239
item.description:
$3,239 · Brand New · Anaconda Basses USA

THE BASS SPOT is excited to be the official US Distributor of these superb instruments! D'Mark Instruments are hand made in Brazil by a passionate family of a father, his wife and their 2 sons. With limited use of power tools, they craft these spectacular instruments to exacting standards using exotic indigenous Brazilian hardwoods. The hand-wound pickups and proprietary electronics yield a "super jazz bass" tone.

Here are the specifications:

Brand: D’Mark

Model: JB X8C

# of strings: 5

Scale: 34”

Body material: Brazilian Mahogany

Top material: Buckeye Burl

Body finish type: Gloss

Body finish color: Natural

Neck construction: Bolt on

Neck material: Brazilian Marfim

# of frets: 24

Neck finish type: Satin

Fingerboard material: Brazilian Pau Ferro

Fingerboard radius: Compound 10” - 22”

Nut material: Brass

Nut Width: 46 mm

Side dot material: Black dots

Fingerboard inlays: Abalone dots

Carbon rod reinforcement: Yes

Neck pickup: D’Mark SN510 IGA Vintage (Individual Gain Adjustment)

Bridge pickup: D’Mark SN510 IGA Vintage (Individual Gain Adjustment)

Electronics: D’Mark custom 3 band

Controls: Volume, balance, bass, midrange, treble, A/P switch, 2 position midrange select

switch

Bridge:Hipshot A style aluminum

String spacing at saddles: 19 mm

24th Fret Width: 77.5 mm

Tuners: Hipshot Ultralite Y Style

Hardware color: Black

Strap buttons: Standard

Weight: 9.0 lbs.

Case: D’Mark Teardrop Hardshell

item.title: 2015 DiPinto Galaxie 4-String Bass RARE Desert Burst! w/original gigbag — $999
item.description:
$999 · Excellent · Next Big Thing Guitars

2015 DiPinto Galaxie Bass! Very cool and very rare Desert Burst finish on double-cut Linden wood body with white pearloid guard. 4-string Maple neck, topped with a bound Rosewood board with block inlays, and the great looking Desert Burst finish continues up the back of the neck and on both the back and front of the headstock. Tone supplied by a single P-style pickup. Chrome hardware. All original with no mods, breaks, or repairs. Bass has barely been played and is in excellent condition. Ships in its original DiPinto gigbag.

All listed Reverb payments accepted from all buyers. Please ask any and all questions before bidding. No international shipping on most items. Please check your state's status with the internet sales tax act to see if tax will be collected.

Thanks for looking, please check out our other gear- Next Big Thing Guitars

item.title: Univox Precisely Bass Early - Mid 1970's — $550
item.description:
$550 · Very Good · Studio Nine Productions (Michael)

Univox Precisely Bass, Early to mid-1970s ("lawsuit era"), made in Japan at the renowned Matsumoku Factory.

I’m calling this a “players grade” Vintage instrument. The bridge is a new Fender replacement for better intonation and stability. A broken tuning peg has been replaced with new. Also has a new Switchcraft input jack. New Smith strings installed. $100 value in replacement parts and strings alone!

This is the model with the sought after oblong humbucker pickup! It has a unique, punchy midrange character, preferable over later generic replacements. The guitar has minimal edge chipping and a working truss rod. Some belt buckle rash is noted on the back. Action is about 3.5mm. The electronics are clean and the guitar is very quiet as far as hum or electrical noise goes.

Shipping is based on your location so you won't pay more than necessary. Get a 50-year-old vintage instrument suitable for gigging without the high cost of a Fender from the same era!

item.title: Jackson 291-9097-585 JS3P JS Series Concert Bass CB - Transparent Black — $469.99
item.description:
$469.99 · Brand New · ProAudioLand

Jackson's JS Series Concert™ Bass models rock seismic sound, style and affordability.

The Concert Bass JS3P is a four-string, 34"-scale model featuring a lightweight and resonant poplar body draped in a beautiful poplar art grain burl top, bolt-on maple neck with graphite reinforcement and a 12"-16" compound radius bound amaranth fingerboard with 24 jumbo frets and sharkfin inlays.

Dual Jackson high-output humbucking bass pickups create a monstrous low-end growl, while a HiMass™ bridge provides rock-solid stability, improved sustain and bolder tone. Tone can be refined and tweaked with a pair of volume controls and an active three-band EQ. Loaded with vibe and value, the Concert Bass JS3P is available in Black Burst Burl and Transparent Black finishes with black hardware.

 

Features

  • Poplar body
  • 34" scale length
  • 12"-16" compound radius amaranth fingerboard
  • Sharkfin inlays
  • 3-band EQ

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray Classic 5 2011 - Gloss — $2,650
item.description:
$2,650 · Excellent · Northern Colorado Fine Instruments

Iconic 2011 Stingray Classic 5, no longer in production. I purchased this from a fellow reverber several years ago, wonderful bass, just making difficult decisions to move along items that are not getting used enough, and as always to make room for other instruments I'd like to try. So many to try, so little time.

This bass is in beautiful condition, the neck flame is gorgeous. Has the alnico pickup and two band eq. Has aftermarket tortoise pickguard, I think I also have the original black pickguard. Currently strung with flatwound strings. The mutes work. The one "flaw" is that the rubber mute pad under the B-string was lost, and a serviceable non-oem replacement was substituted. There is NO other case candy, other than the case itself, which is in fine serviceable condition. The bass itself scales out at an even 10 LBS.

Shipping will be determined by insurance desired and location of buyer, but should come in between $125 and may be as high as $200. Shipping to the U.S. only.


Seller accepts paypal.

item.title: Mint Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special H Fallout Green — $2,419.12
item.description:
$2,419.12 · Mint · Martel Music Store

Ernie Ball StingRay Special H Fallout Green Weight: 8.35 lbs

First introduced in 1976, the StingRay has been revered as one of the most iconic bass guitars in history. The StingRay was one of the first production four string basses to feature onboard active equalization. The flagship of the Music Man line, today's StingRay retains the same signature features that it had some forty years ago, including a solid roadworthy construction, iconic oval pickguard, 3+1 tuning key configuration, and the ever-popular Music Man humbucker — all of which combine to produce a look, feel, and sound that is remarkably unmistakable.

Model: 4 String - H Color: Fallout Green Neck: Roasted Maple w/ Rosewood Fretboard Pickguard: Parchment Hardware: Chrome Build Code 107-FAL-20-06 StingRay SpecialModelStingRay SpecialSize13-1/2" wide, 1-5/8" thick, 44-7/8" long (34.3 cm wide, 4.1 cm thick, 114.0 cm long)Body WoodSelect HardwoodsBody FinishHigh gloss polyester (Except Black Rock - Matte)BridgeVintage Music Man® top loaded chrome plated, steel bridge plate with vintage nickel plated steel saddlesScale Length34" (86.4 cm)Neck Radius11" (27.9 cm)Headstock SizeOnly 8-3/4" (22.2 cm) longFrets22 - High profile, wide, Stainless SteelNeck Width1-11/16" (42.86 mm) at nut 2-1/2" (63.5 mm) at last fretNeck WoodSelect roasted maple neckFingerboardFretted - Maple, Rosewood, or Ebony (dependent on body color)Neck FinishGunstock oil and hand-rubbed special wax blendNeck ColorsStandard – Natural with finished headstockTuning MachinesCustom Music Man, lightweight with tapered string posts and ergonomic clover designTruss RodAdjustable - no component or string removalNeck Attachment5 bolts - perfect alignment with no shifting; Sculpted neck joint allows smooth access to higher fretsElectronic ShieldingChrome or black plated aluminum control cover (dependent on body color)Controls3-band active preamp with 18 volts of headroom; vol, treble, mid, bassSwitchingSingle Pickup - N/A; Dual Pickup - 5-way lever pickup selectorPickupsStandard - Single Humbucking with Neodymium magnets; Optional - Dual Humbucking with Neodymium magnetsStrings45w-65w-80w-100w (Super Slinky Bass #2834)

item.title: Mint Yamaha BB434M Tobacco Brown Sunburst — $580.79
item.description:
$580.79 · Mint · Martel Music Store

Yamaha  BB434M TBS Tobacco Brown Sunburst

You've got the chops and you're ready to nail that audition, hit the stage, or get creative in the studio—now it's time to get out there and get noticed. The 400 lineup continues the BB tradition of great build quality and signature sound that won the series acclaim throughout its forty-year history. Whether you prefer a rosewood fingerboard or the distinctively bright, crisp sound of maple, the precision feel and response of the six bolt miter neck along with the presence and clarityof custom-wound pickups will inspire you to play your best when it really counts.

Featuring a six-bolt miter neck joint, the BB400 series continues the legacy of superb sound and playability of the renowned BB series.

  • Solid Alder Body
  • 6-Bolt Miter Neck Joint
  • 5-piece Neck
  • YGD Custom V5 Pickups (AlnicoV)
  • Vintage Plus Light Bridge : Convertible Bridge and Saddle
  • Lightweight Open Gear Tuners

BB434

General Specifications

General

Construction

Bolt-on (6-bolt miter neck joint )

Scale Length

34" (863.6 mm)

Body

Alder

Body Finish

Gloss Polyurethane

Neck Finish

Satin Polyurethane

Maple

10" (250 mm)

Fret wire

Medium

21

Nut materials

Graphtech

Width @ 0 Fret / 12th Fret

40.0 / 56.3 mm

Thickness @ 1st Fret / 12th Fret

21.0 / 23.0 mm

Electronics

Neck Pickup

VSP5n : Split Single Coil / Alnico V

-

Bridge Pickup

Controls

item.description:
$527.99 · Mint · Martel Music Store

Yamaha BB434TB Teal Blue (SN ILK254032)

You've got the chops and you're ready to nail that audition, hit the stage, or get creative in the studio—now it's time to get out there and get noticed. The 400 lineup continues the BB tradition of great build quality and signature sound that won the series acclaim throughout its forty-year history. Whether you prefer a rosewood fingerboard or the distinctively bright, crisp sound of maple, the precision feel and response of the six bolt miter neck along with the presence and clarityof custom-wound pickups will inspire you to play your best when it really counts.

Featuring a six-bolt miter neck joint, the BB400 series continues the legacy of superb sound and playability of the renowned BB series.

item.title: Mint Yamaha BB435 TBS Tobacco Brown Sunburst 5 String — $580.79
item.description:
$580.79 · Mint · Martel Music Store

Yamaha BB435 TBS Tobacco Brown Sunburst 5 String Weight: 9.2 lbs
  • Solid Alder Body
  • 6-Bolt Miter Neck Joint
  • 5-Piece Neck
  • YGD Custom V5 Pickups (Alnico V)

item.title: Mint Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 5H Special Cherry Punch — $2,683.12
item.description:
$2,683.12 · Mint · Martel Music Store

Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 5H Special in Cherry Punch Weight: 8.05 lbs

The Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 5-String combines classic tone with modern upgrades for maximum performance. Its ash body, roasted maple neck, and 22 stainless steel frets provide durability, resonance, and a smooth playing experience. The 18-volt, 3-band preamp delivers exceptional headroom and tonal flexibility, while the neodymium pickups offer powerful, clean output in one- or two-pickup configurations. With lightweight hardware, it’s the lightest and most versatile StingRay 5 yet—perfect for stage or studio.

Model: 5 String - H Color: Cherry Punch Neck: Roasted Maple w/ Ebony Fretboard Pickguard: Black Hardware: Gold Build Code 207-EY-50-BG1 SpecificationsStingRay 5 SpecialModelStingRay 5 SpecialSize13-3/8" wide, 1-5/8" thick, 45-3/4" long (34.0 cm wide, 4.1 cm thick, 116.2 cm long)Body WoodSelect HardwoodsBody FinishHigh gloss polyester (Except Black Rock - Matte)BridgeVintage Music Man® top loaded chrome plated, steel bridge plate with vintage nickel plated steel saddlesPickguardBlack, White, Mint, or White Pearloid (dependent on body color)Scale Length34" (86.4 cm)Neck Radius11" (27.9 cm)Headstock SizeOnly 9" (22.9 cm) longFrets22 - High profile, wide, Stainless SteelNeck Width1-3/4" (44.5 mm) at nut 2-3/4"" (69.9 mm) at last fretNeck WoodSelect roasted maple neckFingerboardFretted - Maple, Rosewood, or Ebony (dependent on body color)Neck FinishGunstock oil and hand-rubbed special wax blendNeck ColorsStandard – Natural with finished headstockTuning MachinesCustom Music Man, lightweight with tapered string posts and ergonomic clover designTruss RodAdjustable - no component or string removalNeck Attachment5 bolts - perfect alignment with no shifting; Sculpted neck joint allows smooth access to higher fretsElectronic ShieldingGraphite acrylic resin coated body cavity and aluminum lined pickguardControls3-band active preamp with 18 volts of headroom; vol, treble, mid, bassSwitchingSingle Pickup - 3-way lever pickup selector; Dual Pickup - 5-way lever pickup selectorPickupsStandard - Single Humbucking with Neodymium magnets; Optional - Dual Humbucking with Neodymium magnetsLeft HandedNoStrings45w-65w-80w-100w-130w (Regular Slinky Bass #2836)

item.title: Squier Sonic Bronco Bass Laurel Fingerboard White Pickguard Daphne Blue — $259.99
item.description:
$259.99 · Brand New · D-Town Guitars

The Squier Sonic® Bronco® Bass is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender® style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This Bronco Bass sports a slim and inviting "C"-shaped neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort while a Squier® single-coil pickup delivers punchy bass tone. Further details of this model include a short 30" scale length, 4-saddle hardtail bridge for precise intonation adjustment, sealed-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight.Features

  • Short 30" scale length
  • Squier single-coil pickup
  • 4-saddle hardtail bridge
  • Sealed-gear tuning machines
  • Chrome hardware

item.title: ESP LTD TS-4 Tommy Stinson Signature 2013 - 2015 - Distressed Vintage White — $698.76
item.description:
$698.76 · Good · Full Rack Outlet

Cool bass, with low action. Comes with gig bag as shown.

US shipping includes all customs fees.

-


ESP LTD TS-4 Signature Bass Specs:

  • Construction: Bolt-on
  • Scale: 34”
  • Body: Alder
  • Neck: Maple
  • Neck Shape: Thin “U” Contour
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Nut: 42mm Bone
  • Frets: 21 XJ
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Tuners: LTD Vintage Tuners
  • Bridge: LTD DB-4 w/String-thru-body
  • Pickups: EMG P/J
  • Finish: Distressed Vintage White

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller M6 Headless 4-String, Rosewood Fingerboard, Black Swirl — $859
item.description:
$859 · Brand New · Ernie Williamson Music

Located at our shop at 925 S. Rangeline Rd., Joplin, Missouri

Sire Marcus Miller M6 Headless 4-String, Rosewood Fingerboard, Black Swirl

Coming from the series of Sire modern basses is another contemporary bass, the new M6 Headless. It is designed distinctively compared to previous Sire models, weighing less than 8 lbs (based on the 4-string variant) to prevent players from experiencing neck-dive and ensure enhanced comfort and balance in playing. Based on our 4-string samples, the weights are 7 lbs 1 oz, 7 lbs 10 oz, 6 lbs 12 oz, and 7 lbs 8 oz. Equipped with a preamplifier and various switches, it is a highly versatile bass, catering to genres such as pop, rock, metal, blues, and more. The M6 Headless has 24 frets and is available in 4, 5, and 6-string variants. It comes with Sire official gig bag.

BODY

Body Material: Mahogany and Swamp Ash Sandblasted (BK)

Body Shape: Sire M-Headless Shape

Body Color: MA.S(Mahogany Satin), TS.S(Tobacco Sunburst Satin), SGM.S(Surf Green Metallic Satin), BK(Black), Black Swirl, Blue Swirl

NECK

Neck Material: Hard Maple/Mahogany 5 pc

Neck Shape: C-Shape

Scale: 33"~34.5"

Fingerboard Material: Rosewood Edgeless? (Rolled Fretboard Edges)

Fingerboard Radius: 16"

Frets: 2.4 mm Stainless Medium Jumbo, 24 Frets

String Nut: Graphtech Tusq XL/41.9mm nut width

Inlay: WH Pearloid/Abalone Rounded-rectangular Block

Neck Joint: Five Bolts Bushing

ELECTRONICS

Pickup: Marcus Pure-H Revolution Set

Preamp: Marcus Heritage-3 with Middle Frequency Control

Controls: Volume/Tone, Blender, Treble, Middle/Freq, Bass, Pickup Variation SW

Knobs: Aluminum Knob Black

HARDWARE

Bridge: Sire Headless Individual Bass Bridge

String Spacing: 19mm

Tuning Gear: None

Hardware Finish: Black

Pick guard: None

item.title: Alembic Essence 4 String Bass, 1991 - Natural — $3,399
item.description:
$3,399 · Excellent · Ken's Gear Outlet

This is a beautiful Alembic Essence 4 string bass. In incredible condition for a classic bass of this era. I brought it to my local shop and had it set up so it plays great has new strings.

I always wanted an Alembic, so I bought it, but I don't play enough to justify having a bass like this. I can say I owned and played an Alembic.

Please understand that an instrument of this caliber has to be shipped signature required. Please don't buy if you can't receive the bass with a signature.

item.title: Fender American Pro II Precision Electric Bass — $1,489.99
item.description:
$1,489.99 · Excellent · K's Music

The American Professional II Precision Bass draws from more than sixty years of innovation, inspiration and evolution to meet the demands of today's working player. The '63 P Bass profile neck now sports smooth rolled fingerboard edges, a "Super-Natural" satin finish and a newly sculpted neck heel for a supremely comfortable feel and easy access to the upper register. The new V-Mod II Precision Bass split-coil pickup is more articulate than ever while delivering the punch and low-end the P Bass is known for.

Feature:

What it does:

Fender V-Mod II pickups

Articulate, yet warm single-coil tones

Maple neck with '63 C-shaped profile

Comfortable and fast-feeling shape

9.5-inch radius fretboard

Best-of-both worlds; not too flat, not too curved

Alder body

Light weight with a wide tonal range

This bass is in brand new, mint condition - great fretwork, action, and playability. The tonal range on this passive bass will cover nearly every genre of music. Buy with confidence. Carefully packed and shipped to your door.

item.title: Nash PB-57 Black Lollar Pickups GRT-635 — $2,673
item.description:
$2,673 · Brand New · Guitar Riot

Weight: 8 lbs 7 oz
Neck depth 1st fret: .87"
Neck depth 12th fret: .97"

Guitar Riot is Cleveland, Ohio's exclusive Nash dealer!

Bill Nash and company painstakingly build instruments that have the feel, look, and sound of classics from the 1950s and 60s. While every Nash Guitar is unique visually, they are very consistent for sonics and playability. Nash Guitars have period correct neck profiles that feel substantial in a player's hand and make for a very resonant instrument. They only use Nitrocellulose lacquer in every step of the finishing process and offer light, medium, and heavy aging levels standard. Extra Heavy relic is available for an up charge.  Nash Guitars are made for players that want a gig ready, premium playing guitar at a reasonable cost.

Nash Guitars PB-57 in Black with 1-ply white pickguard. Classic combination of alder body and medium C profile maple neck with rosewood slab board. This Nash PB-57 has light aging and is equipped with Lollar Vintage Split Coil pickups. 10" fretboard radius with 6105 fret wire makes for easy playability.

Body: Alder
Color: Black
Neck: C Shape One Piece Maple
Pickups: Lollar Vintage Split Coil
Aging Level: Light
Pickguard: 1 ply White
Nash Case Included

item.title: Ibanez GSRM20-BK Gio miKro Soundgear 2007 - Present - Black — $125
item.description:
$125 · Excellent · Alex's Gear Bazaar

It’s in excellent condition and works as intended with no issues at all. If you have any questions regarding this guitar please don't hesitate to inbox me.
**Will after payment has been received with 1-3 days shipping**

item.title: S. Martyn Blaze 2025 - Satin finish — $2,800
item.description:
$2,800 · Excellent · John's Gear Garage

28” scale

15mm string spacing

This is a beautiful work of art

Teka top wood

Teka" is an alternate spelling of Teak (derived from the Portuguese/Malay tekka). Teak wood (Tectona grandis) is one of the most durable and water-resistant tropical hardwoods in the world. It is characterized by a high natural oil content that protects it from moisture, rotting, warping, and insects

Maple fretboard

Pearly block inlays

This Is a one of a kind bass custom built by an incredible Luthier

item.title: Ibanez SR505 Bass — $390
item.description:
$390 · Fair · Eric's Gear Emporium

For sale is my used Ibanez SR505 five string bass. I recently got a new bass and no longer use this one. Purchased used originally, it has its fair share of scratches from the previous owner, but is in otherwise perfect working condition and feels great to play - the action is low and the neck is in solid shape! Priced to move!

item.title: SPECTOR Icon NS-5 Bolt-On Black Cherry Gloss — $1,354.19
item.description:
$1,354.19 · Brand New · BlueNoteStore Strumenti Musicali

NS-5 Bolt-On Black Cherry Gloss è un basso elettrico a 5 corde della Serie Icon sviluppato da Spector nei laboratori del Custom Shop USA e prodotto nella fabbrica indonesiana di Spector per bassisti che cercano estensione timbrica, comfort ed eleganza. Dotato di pickup Aguilar DCB Soapbar e preamp OBP-2, offre il miglior rapporto qualità prezzo disponibile sul mercato

L’Icon NS-5 Bolt-On Black Cherry Gloss porta il design NS in una configurazione a 5 corde con costruzione bolt-on, mantenendo tutte le caratteristiche iconiche della tradizione Spector in una versione più accessibile. Il body in Alder con tipica curvatura Spector e top in acero quilted, abbinato alla finitura Black Cherry Gloss, garantisce un look raffinato e deciso. L’innesto bolt-on assicura un attacco dinamico e incisivo, mentre il manico in acero a 3 pezzi con tastiera in palissandro e intarsi Crown riprende i dettagli estetici dei modelli Custom Shop USA ed Euro.



Punti di forza del basso elettrico Icon NS-5 Bolt-On Black Cherry Gloss di Spector


        
  • Body in Alder con tipica curvatura Spector e top in acero quilted, finitura Black Cherry Gloss.

    •     
  • Manico bolt-on in acero a 3 pezzi con tastiera in palissandro e intarsi Crown.

    •     
  • Pickup Aguilar DCB Soapbar abbinati al preamp attivo Aguilar OBP-2.

    •     
  • Comfort superiore e suonabilità fluida tipica dei bassi Spector.

    •     
  • Hardware dorato, capotasto in ottone lucidato e ponte locking in alluminio con sellette in ottone.



Specifiche tecniche del basso elettrico Icon NS-5 Bolt-On Black Cherry Gloss di Spector


        
  • Body: Alder con tipica curvatura Spector e top in acero quilted

    •     
  • Finitura: Black Cherry Gloss

    •     
  • Manico: Acero a 3 pezzi, bolt-on

    •     
  • Tastiera: Palissandro con intarsi Crown

    •     
  • Scala: 35” (88,90 cm)

    •     
  • Capotasto: Ottone lucidato

    •     
  • Pickup: Aguilar DCB Soapbar (set)

    •     
  • Preamp: Aguilar OBP-2 attivo

    •     
  • Controlli: Volume, Blend, Bass, Treble

    •     
  • Hardware: Dorato; ponte locking in alluminio con sellette in ottone



L’Icon NS-5 Bolt-On Black Cherry Gloss è progettato per bassisti che desiderano estendere la gamma timbrica a 5 corde unendo estetica elegante e suono definito, con la qualità dell’elettronica Aguilar ad un prezzo altamente competitivo.

item.title: SPECTOR Icon NS-2 Bolt-On White Gloss — $1,230.97
item.description:
$1,230.97 · Brand New · BlueNoteStore Strumenti Musicali

NS-2 Bolt-On White Gloss è un basso elettrico di colore bianco lucido a 4 corde della Serie Icon sviluppato da Spector nei laboratori del Custom Shop USA e prodotto nella fabbrica indonesiana di Spector per bassisti che cercano eleganza, comfort e versatilità timbrica con pickup Aguilar DCB e preamp OBP-2, il tutto al miglior rapporto qualità prezzo disponibile sul mercato

L’Icon NS-2 Bolt-On White Gloss rappresenta l’evoluzione del classico design NS in un formato bolt-on, mantenendo le caratteristiche iconiche Spector pur essendo prodotto in Indonesia per offrire un’alternativa più accessibile. Il body in Alder con la tipica curvatura Spector e top in acero quilted, abbinato alla finitura White Gloss, coniuga estetica raffinata e suonabilità di livello superiore. L’innesto bolt-on tra corpo e manico garantisce un attacco deciso e reattivo. Il manico in acero a 3 pezzi con tastiera in palissandro e intarsi Crown richiama i dettagli dei modelli Custom Shop USA ed Euro, ora proposti in una serie alla portata di tutti.

L’Icon NS-5 Bolt-On Black Stain Gloss rappresenta la combinazione perfetta tra tradizione Spector e innovazione. Con la costruzione bolt-on, mantenendo le caratteristiche iconiche della serie NS, offre al tempo stesso un’alternativa economica ma di livello professionale. Il body in Alder con la tipica curvatura Spector e top in acero quilted, abbinato alla finitura Black Stain Gloss, conferisce un look moderno e aggressivo. item.title: Landing L300 2008 - Green/black — $1,950
item.description:
$1,950 · Very Good · Chris's Gear Garage

An excellent playing Top notch bass. Will upload more description

item.title: Squier Mini Precision Bass 2-Color Sunburst — $209.99
item.description:
$209.99 · Brand New · D-Town Guitars

The Squier Mini Precision Bass® is the perfect companion for players seeking a reduced-size instrument with classic styling and familiar Fender® tone. Highlights include a thin and lightweight body, a short-scale neck with an easy-to-play "C"-shaped profile, a Squier split single-coil pickup with volume and tone controls for sonic variety, and a hardtail bridge for solid tuning stability.

Features

  • 100% Designed by Fender
  • Thin and lightweight body
  • Short-scale neck
  • Split single-coil Precision Bass pickup
  • Sealed die-cast tuning machines

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '60s Jazz Bass Tahitian Coral - with high mass bridge — $380
item.description:
$380 · Excellent · james 's Gear Garage

Nice easy to play bass in close to new condition.  I added a musiclily pro bridge with brass saddles.  No other mods.  I’m just selling this because I’m mostly playing a different jazz bass.  Let me know if you have questions.  Thanks.


Ships to the continental U.S. east of the Rockies for the for the shipping price listed. Ships UPS with reverb safe shipping option and lost or damaged items will be dealt with by the shipper, UPS, and Reverb.  If you do live in a very remote area let me know as I would ask you to pay the actual shipping cost. Please ask questions or come by and try it out as I do not offer returns. thanks.

Specifications:

  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed:Right-handed
  • Body Shape:Jazz
  • Body Material:Poplar
  • Color:Tahitian Coral
  • Body Finish:Gloss Polyurethane
  • Neck Material:Maple
  • Neck Shape:C Shape
  • Neck Joint:Bolt-on
  • Radius:9.5"
  • Fingerboard Material:Indian Laurel
  • Fingerboard Inlay:Pearloid Blocks
  • Number of Frets:20
  • Scale Length:34"
  • Scale Length Type:Standard-scale
  • Nut Width:1.5"
  • Nut Material:Bone
  • Tuners:Vintage-Style
  • Neck Pickup:Fender Designed Alnico Single-coil
  • Bridge Pickup:Fender Designed Alnico Single-coil
  • Controls:2 x volume, 1 x tone
  • Strings:Nickel Plated Steel, .045-.105
  • Case/Gig Bag:Sold Separately
  • Manufacturer Part Number:0374530511

item.title: Tobias Classic V 2025 - Present - Satin Natural — $1,850
item.description:
$1,850 · Excellent · Jeffrie

Reintroduced in 2025 the Classic V has the classic body shape with a highly figured quilted maple top, walnut wings with wenge veneer body, radiused Bartolini MT4C pickups and a 9 volt 3 band preamp with 3 position switch, gold plated Babicz bridge, Gotoh tuners, strap buttons and knobs 34" Asymmetrical 5 piece hard maple w/ purple heart stringer neck through body w/ 24 fret rosewood board, bone nut, 1.61" nut width, dual action truss rod, OEM gig bag. This bass has the neck pup closer to the bridge pup yielding a more aggressive tone than the original. The asymmetrical neck is thinner or the treble side than the bass side. The bass in as-new condition and is lightweight (about 8.6 lbs. Free shipping to ConUS.

item.title: Fender Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 1970 - 1983 - Wine Red — $2,900
item.description:
$2,900 · Excellent · Greg’s Sound Depot

Bought back in the 80’s to learn to play for a music group to provide a rhythm instrument. Never learned to play to the level needed to play full time. Never played it with any consistency. It’s really a brand new instrument as you can see from the pictures.

item.title: Squier Bronco Bass - Black with Custom Tortoise Pickguard - Like New — $225
item.description:
$225 · Excellent · Music Mountain

Squier Bass!


- Bronco Bass


- Like New


- Black


- Custom Tortoise Pickguard


- Sounds and looks great!


Ship fast and secure.


Come and check it out at Music Mountain in Erwin, TN.


🏬 104 Union St

Erwin, TN 37650


We are located 20 minutes from Johnson City and 45 minutes from Asheville.

item.title: Peavey Cirrus 5 — $799
item.description:
$799 · Very Good · Lost Dutchman Music

Peavey Cirrus 5 in gorgeous walnut finish, very good condition, ready for stage or studio.

Description

This is a Peavey Cirrus 5‑string with a beautiful natural walnut finish, known for its boutique-level build quality, fast neck, and articulate yet deep low end. The 35" scale and tight B-string response make it perfect for modern styles that need clarity and punch down low. Active electronics with onboard EQ let you move from smooth, hi-fi tones to aggressive growl without touching your amp. Hardware, electronics, and neck are all solid, with no functional issues.

Condition and wear

Overall condition is “Very Good”: the bass has been played but well cared for. There is slight cosmetic wear near the headstock and light wear by the pickups—purely visual, nothing that affects playability, tone, or stability. Frets have plenty of life, the neck is straight, action is comfortably low with no buzzing on my setup, and the bass intonates well up the neck. It has lived in a smoke‑free environment and is gig‑ready as is.

Why you’ll like it

If you’ve wanted high-end ergonomics and tone without boutique pricing, this Cirrus 5 delivers: lightweight feel, super-comfortable neck profile, and a responsive, modern voice that still sits well in a mix.

item.title: Ibanez SRE400 1997 Rare Ergodyne Prototype SDGR 4-String Bass — $1,013.43
item.description:
$1,013.43 · Excellent · MM's Shop

One of the rarest basses Ibanez ever made — estimated 100 to 150 units worldwide. The SRE400 was a spot production model manufactured in 1997 for only six months, never listed in any official Ibanez catalog. Built as a pre-production prototype to test the Ergodyne body shape and electronics before the full EDB series launched in 1998. Wood body with black gloss lacquer finish, iconic curved Ergodyne silhouette and concave back, paired with the Soundgear SDGR headstock. A genuine piece of Ibanez R&D history. Previously owned and used in studio by Mateus Starling — Brazilian guitarist, Berklee College of Music graduate (Summa Cum Laude) and founder of Starling Academy of Music. Specs: - Model: SRE400 Soundgear by Ibanez (SDGR headstock) - Year: 1997 | Made in Korea - Body: Wood, Black Gloss - Fretboard: Rosewood, 24 frets | Scale: 34" - Pickups: DXP neck + DXJ bridge, active humbuckers - Controls: Volume, Balance, Treble, Bass (active EQ) - Serial: C6073526 Included: padded gig bag + original Ibanez floral strap. Ships via DHL or FedEx with full insurance. Buyer responsible for import duties in destination country.

item.title: D'Mark Master Series JB X7 jbx7 5-string Bass — $2,499
item.description:
$2,499 · Excellent · Atomic Music

This is a pre-owned/used instrument available as shown for local delivery, pickup at our storefront (curbside or in store) in Beltsville, Maryland, or shipment to those in the lower 48/USA only via UPS Ground [a signature will be required for delivery]*.

  • Its electronics have been tested and function 100% as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition. Though it is pre-owned, this bass is quite clean. There are no issues to note with regard to functionality and playability.
  • A generic gig bag [not pictured] will be included.  No other extras are available for this item.
  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood can shrink/swell during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!


Atomic Music store hours:  12pm - 6pm, EST, Monday - Saturday & 12pm - 5pm, EST, Sundays.

Thanks!!

- Atomic Music

item.title: Aria Pro II Cardinal Series CSB-450 csb450 4-string Bass with Case — $799
item.description:
$799 · Good · Atomic Music

This is a pre-owned/used instrument available as shown for local delivery, pickup at our storefront (curbside or in store) in Beltsville, Maryland, or shipment to those in the lower 48/USA only via UPS Ground [a signature will be required for delivery]*.

  • Its electronics have been tested and function 100% as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition. As it is pre-owned, it has acquired surface marks and wear (dings, dents, scratches, scuffs, smudges, etc.) from play/use - all purely cosmetic in nature. There are no issues to note with regard to functionality and playability.
  • The pictured hard case will be included.  No other extras are available for this item.
  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood can shrink/swell during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!


Atomic Music store hours:  12pm - 6pm, EST, Monday - Saturday & 12pm - 5pm, EST, Sundays.

Thanks!!

- Atomic Music

item.title: Squier Sonic Precision Bass Midnight Blue — $269.99
item.description:
$269.99 · Brand New · Music Makers

The Squier Sonic® Precision Bass® is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender® style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This P Bass® sports a slim and inviting "C"-shaped neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort while a Squier® split single-coil pickup delivers punchy bass tone. Further details of this model include a 4-saddle hardtail bridge for precise intonation adjustment, open-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight.

Features

  • Thin and lightweight body
  • Squier split single-coil pickup
  • 4-saddle hardtail bridge
  • Open-gear tuning machines
  • Chrome hardware

All instruments from Music Makers are professionally evaluated and set-up in our historic Galesburg, IL. storefront prior to shipping.

Questions? Send us a message!

item.title: Aguilar Tone Hammer 500 — $500
item.description:
$500 · Very Good · Herbert's Gear Bazaar

Small scratch on top

But excellent

Used on in home have several others I play

item.title: Fender JV Serial 1982 Precision Bass 1982 Tobacco Sunburst PB-57-70 — $2,200
item.description:
$2,200 · Very Good · Jarvis Guitar Shop

One of a kind beauty Being considered as one of the best era for a vintage Fender

Fender Japan Precision Bass PB57-70 (JV series) Made in Japan

Year: 1982 (JV series)

Color: Tobacco Sunburst (T)

Radius: 7.25"


If you want to have a video chat to take a closer look for the guitar, just email me:

whatsapp:+4917616521122


I've been doing international guitar trading for a while. Full experience in shipping and packing guitars.

Feel free to contact me, if you are looking for a certain guitar, I might spot it for you.

It is also possible to do a video chat if you want to take a look at the guitar.

item.title: Carvin LB75-F 1990's - Black - Fretless - Active - w/Case — $1,675
item.description:
$1,675 · Very Good · Super Duper 's Gear

Carvin LB75-F Fretless – Made in USA – All Black – Near Excellent Condition – w/ Hardcase

Super Duper Gear – Curating High-End, Vintage & Collectible Instruments
Houston, TX | Worldwide Shipping | Se habla Español

The Carvin LB75-F is one of the finest fretless basses produced by Carvin during the company’s golden era of American manufacturing. Known for exceptional craftsmanship, premium materials, and remarkable value, the LB75 series has earned a loyal following among professional bassists seeking boutique-level performance without boutique pricing.

This USA-made fretless 5-string is finished in an elegant All Black configuration, giving it a sleek and professional appearance. The fretless design delivers the expressive growl, singing sustain, and smooth articulation that have made fretless basses a favorite among jazz, fusion, gospel, and session players.

Carvin’s neck-through construction provides exceptional sustain, stability, and effortless access to the upper register, while the active electronics offer tremendous tonal flexibility.

This example is in Near Excellent Condition, showing only minimal signs of careful ownership.

Includes a hardcase.

Specs & Features

  • Model: Carvin LB75-F
  • Made in USA
  • Strings: 5-String Fretless
  • Finish: Black
  • Construction: Neck-Through Body
  • Neck: Multi-Laminate Maple Neck
  • Fingerboard: Ebony Fretless Fingerboard
  • Scale Length: 34”
  • Pickups: Carvin Active Pickup Configuration
  • Electronics: Active Preamp
  • Controls: Volume, Blend, Bass, Treble
  • Bridge: Wilkinson High-Mass Bridge
  • Tunners: Sperzel.
  • Hardware: Black
  • Hardcase Included

Condition

  • Near Excellent Condition
  • Minimal signs of use
  • Neck is straight and stable
  • Electronics fully functional
  • Fingerboard presents beautifully
  • No cracks, breaks, or structural repairs
  • Near Excellent overall player and collector condition

Why This LB75-F?

  • USA-made Carvin craftsmanship
  • Desirable fretless 5-string configuration
  • Neck-through construction
  • Active electronics
  • Elegant all-black appearance
  • Includes hardcase
  • Exceptional value compared to modern boutique fretless basses

A Hidden Gem Among American Basses

For decades, Carvin quietly built some of the finest custom and semi-custom instruments in America. The LB75-F remains one of the company’s most respected fretless offerings, delivering outstanding playability, premium construction, and the expressive voice that fretless players seek.

Whether you’re performing jazz, fusion, worship, progressive music, or studio sessions, the LB75-F offers a level of performance that rivals instruments costing significantly more.

Important Notice
Please review all photos carefully. We have done our best to accurately document the condition of this instrument. Additional photos are available upon request.

What You See Is What You Get

The bass shown in the photos is the exact instrument you will receive. No stock images are used. Please review all photos carefully before purchasing.

Ask Before You Order

Feel free to contact us with any questions regarding condition, specifications, or setup.

Follow Super Duper Gear for boutique, vintage, and collectible instruments shipped worldwide from Houston, Texas.

https://reverb.com/shop/super-duper-s-boutique

item.title: Fender American Standard Long Horn Jazz Bass 1989 — $1,825.15
item.description:
$1,825.15 · Excellent · Fender Fever Ltd.

Weight: 9.5 lbs

Fantastic Jazz, hasn't been played much, spent most of it's life in case, in incredible condition with very few marks, plays and sounds absolutely fantastic, comes in original hard case too.

item.title: Squier "JV" PJ-555 1983 - Torino Red — $1,175.29
item.description:
$1,175.29 · Very Good · Fender Fever Ltd.

Weight: 8.9 lbs

A fantastic piece of history with the brilliant dragster pickups, 2 x volume 1x tone passive circuitry. It's in good condition for it's age, plays and sounds great with tons of mojo.

item.title: Fender JB-62 70 US Jazz Bass Reissue MIJ - 1999/2002 - Sunburst — $1,244.42
item.description:
$1,244.42 · Very Good · Fender Fever Ltd.

Weight: 9.4 lbs Serial: T088874

Incredible 62 Reissue with alder body and Seymour Duncan Quarter Pounders, plays and sounds fantastic with 45-105's freshly setup. Condition is very good with minimal signs of use and minor scrathes mainly on the back and edges. It comes in Fender gig-bag.

item.title: Fender Player II Jazz Bass, Maple Fingerboard, Coral Red(SR)(52339) (52339) — $689
item.description:
$689 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight 9lbs 0oz

Up for sale is a Fender Player II Jazz Bass in Coral Red. This one came to us in great shape! The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one does not come with a case.

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Jazz Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

FEATURES:
Contoured Alder Body
Modern "C" Neck Profile
9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil Jazz Bass Pickups
4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
Open-Gear Tuning Machines


SKU:0140482558


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

item.title: Fender Vintera® II Road Worn® '60s Precision Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, Charcoal Frost Metallic (D3)(54261) (54261) — $1,289
item.description:
$1,289 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight 8lbs 9oz

Up for sale is a Fender Vintera® II Road Worn® '60s Precision Bass® in Charcoal Frost Metallic. This one came to us in great shape. The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This is a Road Worn model that will have intentional wear and weather checking to the finish to simulate an older worn in instrument right out of the box. It is in overall excellent condition. This one comes with a Fender hard shell case.

Revive the timeless sound of the '60s with the Vintera® II Road Worn® '60s Precision Bass® and experience the iconic looks, inspiring feel and incomparable tone that only a Fender® can deliver.

Featuring a variety of vintage colors finished in Road Worn® aged nitrocellulose lacquer, the Vintera® II Road Worn® '60s Precision Bass® recreates the look and feel of a well-played classic. The ‘60s “C”-shape maple neck with 7.25" radius rosewood fingerboard and vintage-tall frets provides supreme comfort and outstanding feel. Under the hood, you'll find a vintage-style '60s split-coil Precision pickup that delivers all the warm, dynamic and powerful tone that made Fender® famous. The vintage-style 4-saddle bridge and vintage-style tuning machines provide classic looks with enhanced intonation and tuning stability to complete the package.

Experience the unmistakable vintage feel and unmatched sound of a classic Fender with the Vintera® II Road Worn® ‘60s Precision Bass® today.

Features:


Alder Body Road Worn® Nitrocellulose lacquer finish
7.25" Radius Rosewood Fingerboard with Vintage Tall Frets
Early-'60s "C"-Shape Neck with Road Worn® Nitrocellulose Lacquer Finish
Vintage-Style Early-'60s Split-Coil Pickup
Vintage-Style Reverse Open-Gear Tuning Machines
4-Saddle Vintage-Style Bridge with Threaded Steel Saddles


SKU:0149090369


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

item.description:
$2,903.65 · Excellent · Fender Fever Ltd.

Weight: 8.3 lbs

Remarkable collectors piece in incredible condition, plays and sounds fantastic. These JV Squiers are in a different league, this one even comes with original certificate and gig-bag in excellent condition.
